allow: Bash(npm install *)
Bash(docker run *)
Bash(dotnet restore *)

PowerShell(Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe"\) { "Found at C:\\Program Files\\dotnet" } elseif \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe"\) { "Found at LocalAppData" } else { "dotnet not found" })
PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet restore ECommerce.sln 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)
PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet restore ECommerce.sln 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8)
PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet build ECommerce.sln -c Release --no-restore 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet restore ECommerce.sln 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; dotnet build ECommerce.sln -c Release --no-restore 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet restore ECommerce.sln 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; dotnet build ECommerce.sln -c Release --no-restore 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)
PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet build ECommerce.sln -c Release 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet build ECommerce.sln -c Release 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match "error|Error|FAILED|succeeded|warning CS" } | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet build ECommerce.sln -c Release 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -match ": error " } | Select-Object -First 20)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet ef database update --project src/ECommerce.Persistence --startup-project src/ECommerce.API 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)
PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; dotnet tool install --global dotnet-ef 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)
PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; dotnet tool uninstall --global dotnet-ef; dotnet tool install --global dotnet-ef --version 8.0.11 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet;$env:USERPROFILE\\.dotnet\\tools"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet-ef migrations add InitialCreate --project src/ECommerce.Persistence --startup-project src/ECommerce.API 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet;$env:USERPROFILE\\.dotnet\\tools"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend"; dotnet-ef database update --project src/ECommerce.Persistence --startup-project src/ECommerce.API 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell($env:PATH += ";C:\\Program Files\\dotnet"; cd "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend\\src\\ECommerce.API"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "`$env:PATH += ';C:\\Program Files\\dotnet'; dotnet run --launch-profile http" -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test","password":"test"}' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; $r.StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@ecommerce.com","password":"Admin@123456"}' -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; $body = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($body\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/products" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "OK: " + $r.StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/swagger/v1/swagger.json" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "OK"; $r.Content.Substring\(0,100\) } catch { "FAIL: " + $_.Exception.Message })
PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "d:\\Projects\\E-Commerce Platform\\backend\\src\\ECommerce.API\\Properties" -Force)
PowerShell("done")
